title: Knysna's new 'choo-choo' in the air
description: BUSINESS NEWS - AER Helicopters, founded by...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - AER Helicopters, founded by aviator Duran de Villiers, has launched the first helicopter tour service in Knysna, to boost the town's tourism offerings.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - AER Helicopters, founded by aviator Duran de Villiers, has launched the first helicopter tour service in Knysna, to boost the town's tourism offerings."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"With a passion for flying and a love for the skies, De Villiers has created a unique offering for locals and visitors alike - to explore the natural beauty of the Garden Route from above."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"AER Helicopters offers a variety of thrilling flight packages in its state-of-the-art Airbus H-120, piloted by Chief Pilot Megan Klopper (31), who has been flying helicopters for 10 years.","html":"AER Helicopters offers a variety of thrilling flight packages in its state-of-the-art Airbus H-120, piloted by Chief Pilot Megan Klopper (31), who has been flying helicopters for 10 years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Megan quips that 10 years ago not many people wanted to fly with her. Now, a seasoned pilot, it is a different story… as she deftly manoeuvres her charge seamlessly.","html":"Megan quips that 10 years ago not many people wanted to fly with her. Now, a seasoned pilot, it is a different story… as she deftly manoeuvres her charge seamlessly."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Among the flights offered are:","html":"Among the flights offered are:"},{"type":"list","items":["Knysna Above (15 min): Soar over the world-famous Knysna Heads on this breathtaking journey.","The Milk Run (30 min): \"Our most popular flight, featuring low-level passes along the coast from Sedgefield to Buffels Bay, finishing with a scenic tour of the Knysna Heads and over the Knysna Lagoon.\""],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"For those seeking a more personalised experience, we also offer private charters and custom flights all along the Garden Route,\" says De Villiers.","html":"\"For those seeking a more personalised experience, we also offer private charters and custom flights all along the Garden Route,\" says De Villiers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Maybe there's a couple that wants to go to Cape Town on a date… we can arrange that.","html":"\"Maybe there's a couple that wants to go to Cape Town on a date… we can arrange that."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We offer Knysna something it doesn't have and a great tourist attraction. Knysna no longer has the old choo-choo… but this might be the new choo-choo - from the air!\"","html":"\"We offer Knysna something it doesn't have and a great tourist attraction. Knysna no longer has the old choo-choo… but this might be the new choo-choo - from the air!\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Book your adventure today and experience Knysna in a way you've never imagined!","html":"Book your adventure today and experience Knysna in a way you've never imagined!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
